specific_question: Besides automated reminders and cost effectiveness, what other features available on MediConn Solutions' new CRM software would be important to customers?
answer: According to a survey of virtual healthcare patients completed in January 2025, 90% of patients ranked personalized and timely care as two of the top five reasons for choosing a healthcare provider.
dr_question: The WTT Solution article from March 2025 indicates that Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software is trending in the healthcare industry. How can MediConn Solutions leverage this software to drive the growth of its healthcare services, using patient benefits from the software as a key to increased business by the year 2028?
